initial_candidates.sql:
WITH category_payment_counts AS (
    SELECT 
        p.product_category_name,
        op.payment_type,
        COUNT(op.order_id) AS payment_count
    FROM olist_order_payments op
    JOIN olist_order_items oi ON op.order_id = oi.order_id
    JOIN olist_products p ON oi.product_id = p.product_id
    GROUP BY p.product_category_name, op.payment_type
),
top_payment_per_category AS (
    SELECT 
        product_category_name,
        payment_type,
        payment_count,
        ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY product_category_name ORDER BY payment_count DESC) AS rn
    FROM category_payment_counts
),
top_category_payments AS (
    SELECT 
        product_category_name,
        payment_type,
        payment_count
    FROM top_payment_per_category
    WHERE rn = 1
)
SELECT 
    product_category_name,
    payment_type,
    payment_count
FROM top_category_payments
ORDER BY payment_count DESC
LIMIT 3;

WITH category_payment_counts AS (
    SELECT 
        p.product_category_name,
        op.payment_type,
        COUNT(op.order_id) AS payment_count
    FROM olist_order_payments op
    JOIN olist_order_items oi ON op.order_id = oi.order_id
    JOIN olist_products p ON oi.product_id = p.product_id
    GROUP BY p.product_category_name, op.payment_type
),
ranked_payments AS (
    SELECT 
        product_category_name,
        payment_type,
        payment_count,
        ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY product_category_name ORDER BY payment_count DESC) AS rn
    FROM category_payment_counts
),
top_payment_per_category AS (
    SELECT 
        product_category_name,
        payment_type,
        payment_count
    FROM ranked_payments
    WHERE rn = 1
)
SELECT 
    product_category_name,
    payment_type,
    payment_count
FROM top_payment_per_category
ORDER BY payment_count DESC
LIMIT 3;

WITH category_payment_counts AS (
    SELECT 
        p.product_category_name,
        op.payment_type,
        COUNT(op.order_id) AS payment_count
    FROM olist_order_payments op
    JOIN olist_order_items oi ON op.order_id = oi.order_id
    JOIN olist_products p ON oi.product_id = p.product_id
    GROUP BY p.product_category_name, op.payment_type
),
category_top_payment AS (
    SELECT 
        product_category_name,
        payment_type,
        payment_count,
        ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY product_category_name ORDER BY payment_count DESC) AS rn
    FROM category_payment_counts
),
top_payments_across_categories AS (
    SELECT 
        product_category_name,
        payment_type,
        payment_count
    FROM category_top_payment
    WHERE rn = 1
)
SELECT 
    product_category_name,
    payment_type,
    payment_count
FROM top_payments_across_categories
ORDER BY payment_count DESC
LIMIT 3;

WITH category_payment_counts AS (
    SELECT 
        p.product_category_name,
        op.payment_type,
        COUNT(op.order_id) AS payment_count
    FROM olist_order_payments op
    JOIN olist_order_items oi ON op.order_id = oi.order_id
    JOIN olist_products p ON oi.product_id = p.product_id
    GROUP BY p.product_category_name, op.payment_type
),
category_top_payment AS (
    SELECT 
        product_category_name,
        payment_type,
        payment_count,
        ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY product_category_name ORDER BY payment_count DESC) AS rn
    FROM category_payment_counts
),
top_payments_by_category AS (
    SELECT 
        product_category_name,
        payment_type,
        payment_count
    FROM category_top_payment
    WHERE rn = 1
),
ranked_categories AS (
    SELECT 
        product_category_name,
        payment_type,
        payment_count,
        RANK() OVER (ORDER BY payment_count DESC) AS category_rank
    FROM top_payments_by_category
)
SELECT 
    product_category_name,
    payment_type,
    payment_count
FROM ranked_categories
WHERE category_rank <= 3;

WITH category_payment_counts AS (
    SELECT 
        p.product_category_name,
        op.payment_type,
        COUNT(op.order_id) AS payment_count
    FROM olist_order_payments op
    JOIN olist_order_items oi ON op.order_id = oi.order_id
    JOIN olist_products p ON oi.product_id = p.product_id
    GROUP BY p.product_category_name, op.payment_type
),
top_payments_per_category AS (
    SELECT 
        product_category_name,
        payment_type,
        payment_count,
        ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY product_category_name ORDER BY payment_count DESC) AS rn
    FROM category_payment_counts
),
most_common_payments AS (
    SELECT 
        product_category_name,
        payment_type,
        payment_count
    FROM top_payments_per_category
    WHERE rn = 1
),
ranked_categories AS (
    SELECT 
        product_category_name,
        payment_type,
        payment_count,
        RANK() OVER (ORDER BY payment_count DESC) AS category_rank
    FROM most_common_payments
)
SELECT 
    product_category_name,
    payment_type,
    payment_count
FROM ranked_categories
WHERE category_rank <= 3;
